REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE PURSUANT TO CCP 425.16 IS DENIED. DEFENDANT FAILED TO ESTABLISH THAT THE CHALLENGED CLAIM "ARISES FROM ACTIVITY PROTECTED BY SECTION 425.16." (BARAL V. SCHNITT (2016) 1 CAL. 5TH 376, 395; CIV. CODE SEC. 425.16, SUBD. (B)(1).) PLAINTIFFS' ACTION, FILED PRIOR TO DEFENDANT'S PARTITION ACTION, AROSE FROM AN UNDERLYING DISPUTE REGARDING DEFENDANT'S FIDUCIARY DUTY AND REQUEST FOR ACCOUNTING. AS SUCH, DEFENDANT FAILED TO MEET ITS INITIAL BURDEN. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B) JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Special Motion To Strike Pursuant To Ccp 425.16
Off Calendar May-21-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Aaron Ver; 310-788-9900; Perkins Coie LLP; counsel for plaintiff appearing via Zoom.
Edward Singer; 650-3939-5862; Singer & Scott; counsel for plaintiff appearing via Zoom.

Mr. Singer contests the courts tentative ruling. Argued. The court also rules on defendant V Dorothea LLC's objections. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT REGENT LLC, AN OREGON LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY Notice Of Motion And Motion For Special Motion To Strike Pursuant To Ccp 425.16 is DENIED. Defendant failed to establish that the challenged claim "arises from activity protected by section 425.16." (Baral v. Schnitt (2016) 1 Cal. 5th 376, 395; Civ. Code sec. 425.16, subd. (b)(1).) Plaintiffs' action, filed prior to Defendant's partition action, arose from an underlying dispute regarding Defendant's fiduciary duty and request for accounting. As such, Defendant failed to meet its initial burden.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
